Main Foyer.name: Main Foyer
Main Foyer.description: The school entrance. Trophy cases line the walls, and the linoleum shines under flickering fluorescent lights. The double doors to the outside are chained shut from the inside.
Main Foyer.first_entry_text: The school is deserted after hours. The silence is oppressive. The squeak of your shoes echoes far down the locker-lined hallways.

furniture.name: Trophy Case
furniture.description: A heavy glass cabinet filled with old brass trophies.

objects.name: Flickering Fluorescents
objects.description: The overhead lights buzz and flicker violently, occasionally throwing sparks.

Locker Hallway.name: Locker Hallway
Locker Hallway.description: A long, narrow corridor lined with blue metal lockers. An emergency fire alarm is mounted on the wall. To the east is the Gymnasium, and to the west is the Janitor's Closet.

objects.name: Fire Alarm
objects.description: A standard pull-station alarm. Its green indicator light blinks.

objects.name: Heavy AC Grate
objects.description: A massive steel ventilation grate above the lockers. One of the bolts is rattling loose.

Gymnasium.name: Gymnasium
Gymnasium.description: A massive indoor basketball court. The polished wood floor squeaks. Massive motorized bleachers are retracted against the far wall. An emergency exit sits at the back.

east.locked_message: The exit door is jammed shut. You will have to force it open.

objects.name: Motorized Bleachers
objects.description: Tons of wood and steel held against the wall by a magnetic latch. They loom over the court.

objects.name: Crash Bar
objects.description: The metal bar on the emergency exit shows signs of wear and is jammed tight.

Janitor's Closet.name: Janitor's Closet
Janitor's Closet.description: A cramped, chemical-smelling room filled with mops, buckets, and industrial cleaners. The main electrical breaker box for this wing is mounted here.

furniture.name: Supply Cabinet
furniture.description: A metal cabinet full of cleaning supplies.

objects.name: Breaker Box
objects.description: The central electrical nervous system for the school. It hums with 240 volts of electricity.

objects.name: Floor Stripper Drum
objects.description: A large barrel of highly flammable floor wax stripper. It is leaking.

Boiler Room.name: Boiler Room
Boiler Room.description: The subterranean heart of the school. It is sweltering hot, dark, and filled with a labyrinth of pipes, valves, and a massive furnace.

objects.name: Furnace Valve
objects.description: A massive, corroded gas valve feeding the boiler. You can smell a faint hint of mercaptan.

objects.name: Steam Pipe
objects.description: A high-pressure overhead pipe wrapped in degrading insulation. Boiling water drips from a joint.
